title: Create: Polymore
body:
# Attention: This mod is discontinued.

## This is CREATE: POLYMORE

A create mod addon with a brand new Resource. The Polymers.

Theres 7 Variants of Polymer Block Colors

13 Polymer Liquids and Liquid color

Rubber

And ... Cardboard Boxes

 

The Polymers are a Midgame building Block that does require a relatively complex creation process.

 

This mod is in Open Alpha right now, so theres more to come in the next Update (that update will Take a while, but then itll get maschines and a fabric port yay

 

ATTENTION: This mod requires Create to be installed
